codeReview.summary: The implementation fully meets the expected behavior for the auth-storage-foundation feature. It adds the internal/auth package with a robust SQLite-backed persistence store, environmental variable configuration support without hardcoded secrets, and necessary testing helpers. The code aligns with the mission architecture and respects required invariants (like using the correct WebAuthn tables and handling migrations/schema constraints).

issues.description: The idx_refresh_sessions_token_hash index is not marked as UNIQUE, but the column token_hash typically requires a UNIQUE constraint to ensure no duplicate hashes exist. SQLite will allow duplicates without a UNIQUE constraint.

summary: Feature successfully implements configuration loading and SQLite-backed persistence. Code handles migrations well and no auth bypass was added.
